data.title: Oncoinvent Advances Radspherin Program With New Patent, Phase 2 Recruitment and CFO Hire
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Oncoinvent ASA ( (BRRGF) ) has provided an update.

Oncoinvent ASA, a Norwegian biotech, is developing Radspherin, a receptor-independent alpha radiopharmaceutical designed to destroy residual micrometastases in the abdominal cavity after cancer surgery with a single, localized dose. The therapy targets ovarian and colorectal cancers initially, with broader applicability to peritoneal metastases from other tumors, and is engineered for simplicity, strong safety, and easy integration into existing surgical procedures.

The company announced a webcast highlighting progress in its ovarian cancer program, including recruitment and randomization of 37 patients in an ongoing Phase 2 trial, publication of positive final Phase 1 data in Gynecologic Oncology, and a new patent that strengthens protection around Radspherin. Alongside growing clinical evidence and intellectual-property reinforcement, Oncoinvent reported momentum in pharma partnering, strong expert endorsements, and the appointment of Dr Ramzi Amri as CFO, developments that collectively bolster its competitive positioning and readiness for scaling toward commercialisation in post-surgical cancer care.

More about Oncoinvent ASA

Oncoinvent ASA is a Norwegian biotechnology company focused on developing Radspherin, a receptor-independent alpha radiation therapy designed to eradicate residual cancer cells in the abdominal cavity after surgery. The company’s initial clinical focus is on ovarian and colorectal cancers, with broader potential for malignancies that spread to the peritoneum, offering a localized, low-toxicity alternative to systemic therapies. Radspherin is positioned to integrate seamlessly into existing surgical workflows, supported by cost-effective, scalable manufacturing and backing from leading oncology experts. Founded by the originators of Algeta and Xofigo, Oncoinvent aims to establish a new standard of care in post-surgical cancer treatment and capture blockbuster market potential in peritoneal oncology.

Average Trading Volume: 7,385

Current Market Cap: NOK221.2M

data.title: Egetis Wins FDA Priority Review for Emcitate as EU Launch Gathers Pace
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Egetis Therapeutics AB ( (SE:EGTX) ) is now available.

Egetis Therapeutics reported that the U.S. FDA has accepted and granted Priority Review to its New Drug Application for Emcitate (tiratricol) to treat MCT8 deficiency, setting a PDUFA target action date of September 28, 2026 and indicating it does not currently plan an advisory committee meeting. The company also strengthened its intellectual property with a Notice of Allowance for a U.S. composition patent for Emcitate expected to be Orange Book-listable through 2045, while advancing EU commercialization, increasing European Emcitate revenue 9% at constant exchange rates, and bolstering its balance sheet via an oversubscribed SEK 350 million directed share issue despite posting a quarterly loss.

Operationally, Egetis highlighted continued rollout of Emcitate in Europe, led by Germany where managed access patients have transitioned to commercial product and physician engagement and education initiatives are ongoing. The company is progressing pricing and reimbursement processes in Germany, Italy and France, maintaining modest net revenue growth and cash reserves of MSEK 142.5 as it invests in clinical, regulatory and commercial activities ahead of a potential U.S. launch and possible monetization of a Priority Review Voucher related to Emcitate’s rare pediatric disease status.

More about Egetis Therapeutics AB

Egetis Therapeutics AB is a specialty pharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing treatments for rare endocrine and genetic diseases. Its lead product, Emcitate (tiratricol), targets MCT8 deficiency, a rare thyroid hormone transport disorder, with a key market focus on the U.S. and European markets, including Germany and Italy.

Average Trading Volume: 861,323

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: SEK2.34B

Key Petroleum Limited ( (AU:KEY) ) has issued an announcement.

Key Petroleum Limited has applied for quotation on the ASX of 3,045,858 new ordinary fully paid shares, with an issue date of April 29, 2026. The securities, which arise from previously announced transactions, will expand the company’s quoted share capital and may modestly enhance trading liquidity and broaden participation by existing and new shareholders.

The additional quotation reflects ongoing corporate activity but does not by itself signal a change in Key Petroleum’s core operations or strategic focus. For investors, the move primarily represents a technical adjustment to the company’s capital base, aligning the market’s quoted securities with prior corporate actions disclosed to the exchange.

Key Petroleum Limited is an Australian oil and gas company listed on the ASX under the code KEY. The company is engaged in petroleum exploration and development activities, providing exposure to upstream energy assets for investors in the Australian securities market.

data.title: Dr. Reddy’s Wins First Health Canada Nod for Generic Semaglutide Injection
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Dr. Reddy’s Laboratories Ltd. ( (IN:DRREDDY) ).

Dr. Reddy’s Laboratories has received a Notice of Compliance from Health Canada for its generic Semaglutide Injection, making it the first company to gain marketing authorization for this product in Canada. The approval, which arrived ahead of Health Canada’s review target date, covers 2 mg and 4 mg per pen presentations and carries no fixed expiry, enabling commercialization, sale, and distribution in the Canadian market.

The authorization strengthens Dr. Reddy’s position in complex generics and peptide-based therapeutics, underpinned by fully in-house API production and finished product manufacturing via partner OneSource Specialty Pharma. With launch preparations underway in what is recognized as the world’s second-largest market for Semaglutide, the company stands to benefit from rising diabetes prevalence in Canada and the growing demand for GLP-1 receptor agonist therapies among patients and healthcare systems.

More about Dr. Reddy’s Laboratories Ltd.

Dr. Reddy’s Laboratories Ltd. is a global pharmaceutical company headquartered in Hyderabad, India, with listings in India and the U.S. The company focuses on developing and manufacturing generic and complex medicines, supported by in-house active pharmaceutical ingredient (API) and formulation capabilities, and serves regulated markets including Canada.

data.title: ANZ Group Adjusts Major Holding in Precinct Properties’ 2026 Convertible Notes
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Precinct Properties New Zealand ( (NZ:PCT) ).

ANZ New Zealand Investments Limited, ANZ Bank New Zealand Limited and ANZ Custodial Services New Zealand Limited have disclosed movements in their substantial holding of Precinct Properties’ 7.56% convertible notes maturing 21 September 2026, following on-market trades between October 2023 and March 2026. The aggregated related-party position fluctuated around 15–19% of the PCTHB notes on key dates in February and March 2026, signalling active portfolio management by a major institutional holder and underscoring ongoing institutional appetite and secondary-market liquidity for Precinct’s convertible debt instruments.

While individual holdings for ANZ New Zealand Investments and ANZ Bank shifted through purchases and sales, ANZ Custodial Services’ positions were separately disclosed to avoid double counting within the group total. The disclosures, made under New Zealand’s substantial product holder rules, provide transparency for noteholders and equity investors about concentration of ownership in Precinct’s convertible notes and may be relevant for assessing trading dynamics and potential influence by ANZ-related entities in future corporate actions linked to these securities.

More about Precinct Properties New Zealand

Precinct Properties New Zealand is a listed property company focused on owning, developing, and managing premium commercial real estate, primarily office and mixed-use assets in key New Zealand urban centres. Its capital structure includes listed convertible notes such as the PCT 21/09/2026 7.56% notes (PCTHB), which provide funding flexibility and an additional investment avenue for institutional investors.

data.title: Austin Metals Sharpens Gold Targets with Updated Data and Drill Planning
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Austin Metals Limited ( (AU:AYT) ) has issued an announcement.

Austin Metals has updated an earlier exploration announcement to add further technical disclosures and JORC-compliant information on aeromagnetic data, rock-chip sampling and historic data used at its Austin Gold Project in Western Australia. The revisions clarify sampling numbers and locations and provide expanded reporting tables, aligning the company’s disclosure with ASX and JORC requirements and improving transparency for investors about the basis of its exploration targets.

The company reports progress on an ongoing litho-structural interpretation that integrates high-resolution geophysical surveys, drone imagery and field mapping to build a regional structural framework for targeting gold mineralisation. Completed drone surveys and targeted rock-chip sampling at Brunswick Hill, Mt Sandy and Golconda Well are helping to define additional priority drill targets and support the design of a focused, structurally driven reverse circulation drilling program planned to commence in the second quarter of the year.

More about Austin Metals Limited

Austin Metals Limited is an Australian exploration company focused on gold projects in the Murchison Goldfields of Western Australia. The company is advancing its Austin Gold Project using modern exploration techniques, including high-resolution geophysics, drone imagery and detailed field mapping, to identify structurally controlled gold targets across banded iron formation stratigraphy and major shear zones.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$6.58M

data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Morella Corporation ( (AU:1MC) ) is now available.

Morella Corporation, a lithium and battery minerals explorer with projects in Australia and the United States, is positioning itself to supply critical raw materials for the accelerating global shift to green energy. The company’s strategy centres on securing and developing battery mineral assets in top-tier mining jurisdictions to meet rising demand from the energy storage and electric vehicle sectors.

At an Extraordinary General Meeting on 29 April 2026, shareholders approved all resolutions related to a multi-tranche placement, including ratification of Tranche 1 shares and approval of associated options. Investors also backed the issue of Tranche 2 placement shares and options to Interra Resources and to related parties, including Managing Director James Brown and director Allan Buckler, strengthening Morella’s capital base to fund its battery minerals development plans.

More about Morella Corporation

Morella Corporation is an exploration and resource development company focused on lithium and battery minerals. The company is evaluating several development opportunities in Tier 1 mining jurisdictions in Australia and the United States, aiming to secure and develop raw materials that support surging demand for battery minerals critical to the global transition to green energy.

data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Basin Energy Limited ( (AU:BSN) ) has provided an update.

Basin Energy Limited has called a General Meeting of shareholders to be held in person in Perth on 5 June 2026, with meeting materials made available electronically via the company’s website and ASX announcements platform instead of physical mail-outs, except for investors who have elected to receive hard copies. Shareholders are being urged to participate by lodging proxy votes through multiple available channels before the stated cut-off time, underscoring the company’s push for efficient shareholder engagement and compliance with updated communication practices under the Corporations Act.

The move to digital distribution of meeting documents reflects a broader trend towards streamlined, cost-effective corporate governance across the resources sector. For investors, the arrangements highlight the importance of monitoring online communications for timely access to information and ensuring proxies are submitted correctly to exercise their voting rights on company matters.

More about Basin Energy Limited

Basin Energy Limited is a green energy metals exploration and development company listed on the ASX under the code BSN. It holds interests in three highly prospective uranium projects on the southeast margins of Canada’s Athabasca Basin, along with 100% ownership of uranium and green energy metals exploration assets in the Nordic region and uranium-rare earths projects west of Mount Isa in Queensland, Australia.

data.title: HKEX Posts Record Q1 2026 Results as Trading and Connect Volumes Hit New Highs
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Hong Kong Exchanges & Clearing ( (HK:0388) ) has provided an announcement.

Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing reported record revenue and profit for the first quarter of 2026, driven by heightened global demand for safe-haven assets and access to Asian growth. Hong Kong retained its status as a leading global IPO venue, supported by a strong pipeline of innovative and growth-sector listings.

Secondary market turnover surged, with 20 trading days above HK$300 billion and a new quarterly high in Northbound Stock Connect activity, underscoring robust participation from both Mainland Chinese and international investors. Beyond equities, record volumes at the London Metal Exchange and OTC Clear, along with resilient data and connectivity businesses, highlighted the strength of HKEX’s diversified multi-asset platform.

The group advanced key strategic initiatives, including the next phase of minimum spread reductions, a consultation on enhancing the competitiveness of Hong Kong’s listing framework and new stock options and indices to broaden its product ecosystem. New collaborations with Brazil’s B3 and Bursa Malaysia on carbon and commodities markets, plus initiatives such as HKEX Foundation’s Care for Caregivers Programme, reinforced its regional connectivity and stakeholder engagement ambitions.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0388) stock is a Buy with a HK$545.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hong Kong Exchanges & Clearing stock, see the HK:0388 Stock Forecast page.

More about Hong Kong Exchanges & Clearing

Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing Limited operates Hong Kong’s stock and derivatives markets, providing multi-asset trading, clearing and market data services. Through platforms such as Stock Connect, OTC Clear and the London Metal Exchange, it connects international and Chinese Mainland investors and issuers, with a growing focus on commodities, indices and cross-border connectivity.
